name: Tortilla Chicken Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boullion powder into enough water to cover the chicken thoroughly.
2. Boil until the chicken is cooked through; shred the chicken and return it to the broth.
3. Stack several tortillas at a time, cut into squares using a pizza cutter.
4. Place the tortilla squares in a plastic bag with just enough flour to lightly coat each square. Make sure they are separated.
5. Carefully drop "dumplings" a few at a time into the boiling broth.
6. Cover and reduce heat to a medium boil; simmer until the tortillas are soft and tender.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the can of cream of chicken soup.
